expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((DynCPoMonSmb = 'EURO') AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'EUR' ELSE DynCPoMonSmb END) AS string)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(DynCPoFecha AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN (TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(DynCPoFecha AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(DynCPoFecha AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN (TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(DynCPoFecha AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) ELSE (TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(DynCPoFecha AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) END)
(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY fecha_dato ORDER BY fecha_dato NULLS FIRST))
